title: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it
summary: The author built a deliberately vulnerable web application and spent $1,500 on LLM API calls to test if models like GPT-4 and Claude could autonomously hack it. Results showed LLMs can perform basic reconnaissance and exploit simple vulnerabilities but struggle with multi-step reasoning, chaining exploits, and adapting to dynamic environments. The experiment highlights current limitations in LLM-driven penetration testing.
